title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker24: trickle.c
notes: Commit: fa4d651c8. Unified trickle.c with stopped sentinel from worker24, cleaned bead refs and comments, full NULL guards, reset logic matching Rust/RFC. Header and test comments updated. Test builds (trickle.c.o succeeded).
